title: Healthcare Data Pipeline Modernization
pain_points: Patient data scattered across 5 different systems
HIPAA compliance concerns with data transfers
Manual reconciliation taking 20 hours per week
No single source of truth for patient records
solution_summary: Built a HIPAA-compliant integration layer using Azure Logic Apps and FHIR API standards. Automated patient data reconciliation and created a unified dashboard in Power BI for real-time reporting.
outcomes: 20 hours per week saved on manual reconciliation
Single source of truth established across all departments
Real-time patient data visibility across all departments
